name: V.F. Corporation
description: VF Corporation is a leading global apparel and footwear company that manages a diverse portfolio of iconic outdoor, active, and lifestyle brands, including Vans, The North Face, and Timberland. Founded in 1899 and headquartered in Denver, Colorado, the company provides high-quality products for consumers across the globe. VF Corporation is committed to sustainable business practices and innovation, aiming to create positive impacts on people and the planet while delivering long-term value to its shareholders through its extensive reach in the Americas, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific regions.
